description: Fix corner modifier buttons disabled during shape selection with Selection tool, and replace Sharp/Round Corner icons with 1/4 corner SVGs.

userStories.title: Fix corner modifier buttons disabled during shape selection
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Sharp/Round Corner buttons to be usable when I select existing rectangle/rhombus shapes with the Selection tool, so I can modify their corner style without having to re-select the drawing tool.
acceptanceCriteria: Rename canRoundCorner to isCornerModifierEnabled and change logic from only activeTool check to OR logic
Condition A (Global Preset): activeTool is one of rectangle, rectangle-solid, rhombus, rhombus-solid (existing logic)
Condition B (Attribute Modifier): activeTool === 'select' AND selectedElements.length > 0 AND at least one selected element has type 'rectangle' or 'rhombus'
Button is enabled when Condition A OR Condition B is true
When Condition B is met and Sharp Corner is clicked, iterate through selected elements, set eligible ones' borderRadius to 0, push history, call onSceneMutate('update')
When Condition B is met and Round Corner is clicked, same flow but set borderRadius to 12
Button visual active state correctly reflects isRoundCornerEnabled value regardless of which condition triggered enabled state
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Replace corner modifier icons with 1/4 corner SVGs
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Sharp/Round Corner icons to show just the corner symbol (not the full shape), so I can more quickly understand what each button controls.
acceptanceCriteria: SharpCornerIcon replaced with 1/4 square L-shape corner SVG: path M 8 16 L 8 8 L 16 8 on viewBox 0 0 24 24, strokeWidth 2, strokeLinecap round, strokeLinejoin round
RoundCornerIcon replaced with 1/4 circular arc SVG: path M 8 16 A 8 8 0 0 1 16 8 on viewBox 0 0 24 24, strokeWidth 2, strokeLinecap round
Both icons use currentColor for stroke and fill none for consistent theming
Active state (highlighted border/background) displays correctly when respective corner mode is active
Disabled state (opacity 0.4, muted color) displays correctly when neither Condition A nor Condition B is met
Hover state shows background color change consistently with other toolbar buttons
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
